emails.subject: Socal - Deal #151617 for July '00
emails.body: Socal Deal #151617 for July '00 Janie, I have been talking with EES and they have confirmed their volumes for their purchases from ENA (I believe that it is Zarin who comfirmed their volumes on their side). I need you to confirm and verify our volumes and to change them (or contact who can change them) if needed. I am trying to get EES to pay us for these transactions and they will not if they do not agree. The amount that we are talking about is over $10 mil. Could you please look at this so that I can get this resolved today? The following shows what we are out: Please let me know what you find out. Thanks...

emails.subject: Re: Socal - Deal #151617 for July '00
emails.body: Re: Socal Deal #151617 for July '00 I do not track volumes but I will forward this to our scheduling group-Patti Sullivan
